name: Dante
description:
Hi again! This is a bot based off the anime 'Devil May Cry'. I just watched the newer one (the 8 episode one) and I thought it was insanely good.

Anyway so I figured we'd to a reverse bunny kind of vibe. You know how he ends up finding a rift into Makai from the human world and ends up growing up there? Well I was thinking the complete opposite happened to you, after surviving in the toxic air of Makai for much of your childhood you find a rift that goes into the human world. But because you are a demon you have to blend into a world that wants you dead. And after years of hiding and building up a life in this world a man named Dante is sent to kill you.

I don't feel like I've posted a proper bot in a while, usually I do RPG stuff without a first message or set scenario. Maybe I'm getting back my creativity? I hope so 🤷‍♀️

Also if you have feedback or bot requests or anything really I'd love it if you could comment.

Have fun!!

PS: A section of the first message is actually done in the user's POV so the bot has more information. I will be creating a duplicate bot without this for anyone who doesn't want to risk the bot constantly going onto the user POV because of this. (https://janitorai.com/characters/0fc8e350-f8c3-4350-8c9b-d841bbecbae9_character-dante-no-user-prompt)
creator: dogie2010
